news.t: These stock pickers just had their worst month of 2025 at trying to beat benchmarks
Analysts Anticipate The Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF To Hit $150
Implied Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF Analyst Target Price: $146
Analysts Anticipate The Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF Will Reach $147
How The Pieces Add Up: The Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF Targets $147

holdings.infoBox: VONE is an equity ETF with a total of 1019 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.14%, Apple at 6.50%, Microsoft at 4.83%, Amazon.com at 3.75%, and Alphabet at 3.20%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF (VONE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 indexThe fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of the 1000 largest US companies. VONE was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: These stock pickers just had their worst month of 2025 at trying to beat benchmarks
data.text: After a “weak” July for active large-cap equity mutual funds, a majority are underperforming their benchmarks this year, according to BofA Global Research.

data.title: Analysts Anticipate The Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF To Hit $150
data.text: For the Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $149.91 per unit.
